name: SOC Response Playbook — Incident b0d91217-3e28-4d2d-b7b3-1c67c6c32596
description:
Here is the analysis:

**SUMMARY:** A high-severity threat was detected attempting to perform SMB lateral movement from IP address 192.168.1.33.

**TECHNIQUE:** T1059: Command Execution (likely due to the blocked IP attempting to execute commands on a vulnerable system).

**ACTION:** BLOCK_IP
